message:
feat(phase2c): generate evidence packs for packets P2C-001 and P2C-007 with conformance workflow integration and e2e journey scripts

Phase2c evidence pack generation and conformance improvements:

Packet FNP-P2C-001 (shape/reshape/broadcast):
- Add differential, metamorphic, and adversarial evidence bundle
- Add e2e replay forensics evidence and workflow scenario artifacts
- Add optimization profile report with isomorphism evidence
- Add final evidence pack, scrub report, and reliability reports
- Update behavior extraction ledger, fixture manifest, parity reports,
  packet readiness report, and risk note

Packet FNP-P2C-007 (RNG/deterministic seed streams):
- Add full evidence pack: differential/metamorphic/adversarial evidence,
  e2e replay forensics, optimization profile, parity reports (decode proof,
  raptorq, scrub), fixture manifest, parity gate, security gate report,
  test contract gate report, workflow scenario artifacts and reliability
- Add final evidence pack with cross-linked diagnostics
- Update behavior extraction ledger and risk note

Packet FNP-P2C-002/P2C-003/P2C-004:
- Update unit property evidence (P2C-002)
- Add packet readiness report and unit property evidence (P2C-003)
- Update packet readiness report (P2C-004)

Conformance test source changes:
- Add RNG fixture case workflow step type with full deserialization support
  for differential, metamorphic, and adversarial RNG fixture cases
- Integrate fnp_random::DeterministicRng into workflow scenario runner for
  seed stream, jump witness, state restore, bounded, and budget guardrail
  test execution
- Add shape_reshape_packet_replay and shape_reshape_packet_hostile_guardrails
  workflow scenarios for packet-001 golden path and adversarial coverage
- Add rng_packet_replay and rng_packet_hostile_guardrails workflow scenarios
  for packet-007 golden path and adversarial coverage
- Register RNG differential/metamorphic/adversarial fixture collections and
  packet-001/packet-007 replay scripts in forensics artifact index
- Remove resolved gap bd-23m.12.7 (reshape-heavy workflow steps now landed)
- Update fnp-random lib.rs exports

New binary crates:
- generate_packet001_final_evidence_pack.rs
- generate_packet001_optimization_report.rs
- generate_packet007_final_evidence_pack.rs
- generate_packet007_optimization_report.rs

New e2e journey scripts:
- scripts/e2e/run_shape_contract_journey.sh (packet-001 replay wrapper)
- scripts/e2e/run_rng_contract_journey.sh (packet-007 replay wrapper)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
+TS="$(date +%s)"
+LOG_PATH="${1:-$ROOT_DIR/artifacts/logs/workflow_scenario_packet007_e2e_${TS}.jsonl}"
+REPORT_PATH="${2:-${FNP_RNG_WORKFLOW_RELIABILITY_REPORT:-$ROOT_DIR/artifacts/logs/workflow_scenario_packet007_reliability_${TS}.json}}"
+ARTIFACT_INDEX_PATH="${3:-${FNP_RNG_WORKFLOW_ARTIFACT_INDEX:-$ROOT_DIR/artifacts/logs/workflow_scenario_packet007_artifact_index_${TS}.json}}"
+RETRIES="${FNP_RNG_WORKFLOW_RETRIES:-${FNP_WORKFLOW_RETRIES:-1}}"
+FLAKE_BUDGET="${FNP_RNG_WORKFLOW_FLAKE_BUDGET:-${FNP_WORKFLOW_FLAKE_BUDGET:-0}}"
+COVERAGE_FLOOR="${FNP_RNG_WORKFLOW_COVERAGE_FLOOR:-${FNP_WORKFLOW_COVERAGE_FLOOR:-1.0}}"
+
+cd "$ROOT_DIR"
+
+echo "[rng-contract-journey] root=$ROOT_DIR"
+echo "[rng-contract-journey] workflow_log=$LOG_PATH"
+echo "[rng-contract-journey] reliability_report=$REPORT_PATH"
+echo "[rng-contract-journey] artifact_index=$ARTIFACT_INDEX_PATH"
+echo "[rng-contract-journey] retries=$RETRIES flake_budget=$FLAKE_BUDGET coverage_floor=$COVERAGE_FLOOR"
+
+rch exec -- cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_workflow_scenario_gate -- \
+  --log-path "$LOG_PATH" \
+  --artifact-index-path "$ARTIFACT_INDEX_PATH" \
+  --report-path "$REPORT_PATH" \
+  --retries "$RETRIES" \
+  --flake-budget "$FLAKE_BUDGET" \
+  --coverage-floor "$COVERAGE_FLOOR"
+
+echo "[rng-contract-journey] completed"
